moments.title: World Cup Aftermath on the Charts
moments.blurb: Following England's semi-final exit and Spain's victory, the 2026 FIFA World Cup has left its mark on the UK Singles Chart, with football anthems and themed tracks surging.

angles.name: Chart Surges
angles.copy: Wonderwall back in the Top 5? Three Lions roaring at #3? The World Cup fallout has truly impacted the charts this week. What was your tournament soundtrack?

angles.name: Spain Wins, UK Charts React
angles.copy: Spain might have lifted the trophy on Sunday, but the UK charts are still buzzing with World Cup fever. Oasis, Baddiel & Skinner, and Shakira & Burna Boy all in the Top 10. Football's coming home... to our playlists!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Persists
moments.blurb: Parts of the UK, particularly southern England and Wales, are experiencing a prolonged heatwave, with temperatures predicted to remain high this week.

angles.name: Beat the Heat
angles.copy: Another scorcher today! With the heatwave set to continue, how are you staying cool? Ice cream, paddling pool, or just hiding indoors with the fan on full blast? #UKHeatwave

angles.name: Summer Loving
angles.copy: The sun's out and it's set to stay! While some are melting, others are loving this prolonged summer heat. What's your favourite thing about the UK heatwave?

moments.title: Major UK Festivals This Weekend
moments.blurb: Latitude, Truck, and WOMAD Festivals all kick off this Thursday, July 23rd, bringing a huge weekend of music and arts to Suffolk, Oxfordshire, and Wiltshire.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Hands up if you're heading to Latitude, Truck or WOMAD this weekend! Three massive festivals kicking off Thursday, promising sunshine, stages and unforgettable sets. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Camping Essentials
angles.copy: Festival season is in full swing! If you're off to Latitude, Truck or WOMAD this weekend, what's the one essential you absolutely cannot forget for a successful camp? (Beyond the obvious tent and tickets!)

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, George Clinton!
moments.blurb: The legendary 'Godfather of Funk', George Clinton, turns 85 tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only George Clinton, the Godfather of Funk, celebrates his 85th birthday! Get down with Parliament-Funkadelic all day. What's your favourite P-Funk track?

angles.name: Happy Birthday George
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 85th birthday to the iconic George Clinton tomorrow! His influence on music is immeasurable. Time to get some 'Flash Light' or 'One Nation Under a Groove' on!

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Selena Gomez!
moments.blurb: Pop superstar and actress Selena Gomez turns 34 tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Tomorrow we celebrate the amazing Selena Gomez turning 34! From Disney star to pop sensation, she's given us so many hits. What's your go-to Selena track?

angles.name: Selena's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 34th birthday to Selena Gomez tomorrow! Let's get 'Come & Get It' or 'Lose You to Love Me' on repeat to celebrate.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley!
moments.blurb: The legendary Eagles co-founder and singer-songwriter Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Don Henley of The Eagles turns 79! Get ready to sing along to 'Hotel California' and 'The Boys of Summer'. What's your favourite Henley moment?

angles.name: Classic Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to rock legend Don Henley tomorrow! His voice defined an era. What's the ultimate Eagles track for you?

moments.title: Welsh Festivals This Weekend
moments.blurb: Steelhouse Festival and Big Love music festival are both happening in Wales this weekend, bringing rock and diverse music to the Welsh countryside.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Are you ready for a weekend of incredible live music in Wales? Steelhouse Festival and Big Love are both on! Where will you be soaking up the sounds?

angles.name: Local Music Scene
angles.copy: Huge weekend for live music in Wales! Steelhouse and Big Love festivals are bringing the noise. Support your local music scene and let us know if you're there!

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez!
moments.blurb: The multi-talented global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: J-Lo's Big Day
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on Thursday. A true icon of music, film and fashion. What's your favourite J-Lo track to get the party started?

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 57th birthday to the one and only J-Lo this Thursday! Still ruling the world. What's her most iconic moment for you?

moments.title: Happy 75th Birthday, Verdine White!
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the iconic bassist and co-founder of Earth, Wind & Fire, turns 75 on July 25th.

angles.name: Earth, Wind & Fire Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to boogie! Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75 on Friday! The man with the moves and the grooves. What's your favourite EWF anthem?

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the legendary Verdine White this Friday! His basslines are pure magic. Time to blast 'September' and 'Boogie Wonderland'!

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger!
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday?! The man is still a force of nature. What's the ultimate Rolling Stones track that gets you moving?

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger this Sunday! From Hyde Park to stadiums worldwide, he's still got it. What's your favourite live Stones moment?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Roger Taylor!
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic drummer, Roger Taylor, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Sunday! Those drum fills are instantly recognisable. What's your favourite Queen track to drum along to?

angles.name: Iconic Beat
angles.copy: Happy 77th to Roger Taylor of Queen this Sunday! The man behind some of rock's most iconic beats. What's your favourite Queen album?

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Stormzy!
moments.blurb: Grime superstar Stormzy, known for his impactful music and activism, turns 33 on July 26th.

angles.name: Grime King
angles.copy: Big up Stormzy for his 33rd birthday this Sunday! A true game-changer in UK music. What's the Stormzy track that always gets you hyped?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Big Mike
angles.copy: Wishing a massive happy 33rd birthday to Stormzy this Sunday! From Glastonbury headliner to chart-topper, he's a legend. What's your favourite album from Big Mike?

moments.title: End of July Festival Rush
moments.blurb: The last weekend of July sees a flurry of major UK festivals starting, including Belladrum Tartan Heart, Y-Not, Camp Bestival Dorset, and Wilderness Festival.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just days until Belladrum, Y-Not, Camp Bestival, and Wilderness kick off! Who's packing their wellies and glitter for the final festival push of July?

angles.name: Summer's Grand Finale
angles.copy: Belladrum with James and The Human League, Y-Not with The Libertines and The Streets - the end of July is stacked with incredible festivals! Which one are you wishing you were at?

moments.title: Happy 63rd Birthday, Fatboy Slim!
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as the pioneering DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, turns 63 on July 31st.

angles.name: Big Beat Birthday
angles.copy: Praise You! Fatboy Slim turns 63 this Friday, July 31st. The legendary DJ and producer who soundtracked a generation. What's your ultimate Fatboy Slim tune?

angles.name: Right Here, Right Now
angles.copy: Wishing a huge happy 63rd birthday to Fatboy Slim this Friday! Still bringing the party. What's your favourite memory of seeing him live or hearing his tracks out?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Joe Elliott!
moments.blurb: Def Leppard's dynamic frontman, Joe Elliott, celebrates his 67th birthday on August 1st.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Pour Some Sugar On Me! Def Leppard's legendary singer, Joe Elliott, turns 67 on Saturday, August 1st. What's your favourite power ballad or stadium anthem from the band?

angles.name: High 'n' Dry
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Joe Elliott of Def Leppard this Saturday! Still rocking harder than ever. What's the first Def Leppard song you ever heard?
